title: cli-tools.yaml
description: Profile-keyed third-party CLI install catalog. Mirrors the narrative companion at `core/policies/cli-tools.md`. Consumed by `scripts/setup.sh` (install) and `agent-runtime doctor` (probe). Nils-cli binaries (`agent-out`, `agent-docs`, `semantic-commit`, etc.) are NOT listed here â€” they install via the `nils-cli` Homebrew formula and live in `docs/source/nils-cli-surface.md`.

profiles.description: Profile name -> ordered list of formula keys. `core` is the minimum daily-use floor; `recommended` adds productivity tools; `full` adds every tool from the policy catalog.

formulas.description: Formula entries keyed by the same name used in profile lists. Every formula referenced from any profile MUST have an entry here.

brew.description: Homebrew formula name (the value passed to `brew install`).

command.description: Primary binary the formula installs (the binary `agent-runtime doctor` probes via `<command> --version`).

linux_only_alternative.description: Alternative formula name to install on Linux when the macOS formula does not apply (e.g. macOS-specific casks). `null` when the formula installs the same way on both, or when the formula has no Linux equivalent (the policy doc explains the omission).

categories.description: One or more category tags matching `core/policies/cli-tools.md` section names (e.g. `search`, `docs`, `vcs`, `api`, `test`, `toolchain`, `media`, `ops`, `macos-automation`).

notes.description: Free-text notes for setup / doctor (e.g. `macOS only`, `requires homebrew/cask-fonts tap`).
